Anti-Harassment: Policy 1.0: Zero tolerance for verbal, physical, or digital harassment. Includes workplace intimidation and bullying. Reports must be processed with high severity.
Fair Labor Standards: Policy 2.0: Compliance with legal work hours. Any mandatory late-night shifts without compensation or consent are strictly prohibited.
Conflict of Interest: Policy 3.0: All relationships between supervisors and subordinates must be disclosed to HR to avoid bias or influence.
Data Privacy & Anonymity: Policy 4.0: All employee reports are processed via an encrypted tunnel. PII (Names, IDs, Contact) must be purged/redacted immediately upon submission.
Whistleblower Protection: Policy 5.0: Employees have a protected right to report misconduct without fear of retaliation, demotion, or termination.
Workplace Safety: Policy 6.0: All physical and digital workspace issues that compromise employee wellbeing must be flagged for immediate Facilities or IT review.
